ceramic.def: 陶瓷的、陶器的、陶瓷工藝的人的人物 (單數)
ceramic.ex: The bathroom is decorated with beautiful blue ceramic tiles.

ceramics.def: 製陶術、陶瓷工藝、陶瓷製品 (單數/複數) (單數)
ceramics.ex: She is taking an evening class to learn traditional ceramics.

ceramist.ex: The noted ceramist is famous for her unique glazed bowls.

cereal.def: 穀類植物、穀類食品、早餐麥片、穀類的的人物 (穀物)
cereal.ex: I like to eat whole-grain cereal with fresh milk for tea.

cerebellum.ex: The cerebellum is the part of the brain that controls balance.

cerebral.def: 大腦的、理智的、腦的人的人物
cerebral.col: cerebral palsy (腦性麻痺), cerebral hemorrhage
cerebral.ex: The movie is a very cerebral thriller with a complex plot.
